title: Countered's Smooth Steps
description: A mod that smooths out the camera when stepping up stairs, slabs and more!
body:
# Countered's Smooth Steps

## Description:

A simple mod that mainly aims to make traversing terrain more enjoyable when also playing with the "[Countered's Terrain Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/countereds-terrain-slabs)" mod.

The mod allows for a smoother transition when stepping up blocks within the players step height, like stairs and slabs.

Configurable via Midnightlib!

## Follow Countered for updates!
